title: What's New in WorshipFlow
message: Here's everything that's been added and improved as of March 2026:

highlights: Verse of the Day — a daily NLT Bible verse with inspiring insight and cross-references now sits at the top of every dashboard. React with 6 emotion emojis (Praying, Love, Fire, Touched, Blessed, Worship) — reactions save instantly and persist across all users.
Bento-grid dashboard — all team members (Worship Leader, Music Director, Member) now see a beautiful card-based layout tailored to their own role and permissions, matching the Admin layout style.
Dashboard greeting — personalized greeting now appears above the Verse of the Day with the user's name and time of day.
Church Events tile — renamed and redesigned to correctly count upcoming events (not just services) with member avatars drawn from the schedule.
Dashboard cards height — reduced card heights across the board to show more information without excessive scrolling.
What's New broadcast — auto-generate now pulls from the curated release notes file for accurate and up-to-date feature highlights.
Broadcast targeting — admins can now target broadcasts to all members, specific roles, or individuals.
Quick Actions — the icon grid now stretches edge-to-edge for faster one-tap access on mobile.
Calendar event panel — tapping a date on mobile now opens a centered modal instead of a bottom sheet.
Profile photo fallbacks — member avatars resolve through multiple fallback strategies for higher accuracy.
Sidebar navigation — automatically closes on mobile when navigating to Scheduling.
Admin badge — redesigned with a subtle glow and correct alignment next to the greeting name.
Performance — multiple rendering bugs fixed across dashboard and scheduling modules.
